statement: NVIDIA reported total supply-related commitments of $119.0 billion and inventory of $25.8 billion, saying it has secured inventory and capacity to meet demand beyond the next several quarters.
why: Large and growing supply commitments show NVIDIA locking in wafer, packaging and component capacity to expand future output.

impact.mechanism: Rising supply-related commitments expand secured capacity across the GPU supply chain to meet forward demand.

evidence.excerpt: total supply-related commitments were $119.0 billion. We have strategically secured inventory and capacity to meet demand beyond the next several quarters.

confidence.basis: Primary NVIDIA CFO commentary; commitments stated verbatim.
